reviews.review_title: i can't view my own 360Photos folder
reviews.review_description: I can't see the 360 ​​photos from my own renders album, the app says there is no 360 photo

This used to be my favorite app and now I start it up and it just goes black and locks up my whole Oculus. I'll give you 5 Stars if you put it back the way it used to be...just put it back. Also I gave you the one star because I've noticed a lot of comments on this since the update I don't see any response from the Developers!
You can see sights all over the world! It's really quite amazing. I use this app to introduce new users to vr. Every image is astounding.

What happened to all the new content?  Did all the photographers ditch this output?  Is there an app that anyone can recommend that still posts new content?  I use log on every other day to see new photos but now it’s like all the publishers disappeared... what gives?!
Only complaint is the lack of 3D photo viewing. Movie player plays 3D movies, I'd think this would work with 3D photos.
I had this on my go, I wanted it for my quest, a useable lightweight viewer for 360 images, now it is dead? Sucks. Anything that replaces it?
At nadir and zenith picture waves as i look around. Never happened before. Also app crash in 2-3 min on my s6 with fresh reinstall too. I'm sad.
I have problems using lumion rendering in Photo 360 :(
What we have been waiting for... Google Cardboard Camera photo support! Even though it is lacking playback of the audio track, the best viewer for this type of pictures by far.

Needs better Facebook intergration. Lots of 360 content on Facebook  that you have to access outside the VR environment. The images on there are amazing and is an excellent way to introduce people to VR. Very immersive
I really like your app but please remember to tell people how this works without even using the description. Thank you! P.S. please do It. ;)
Nice bruh
Followed online instructions and still can't view photos. No support.

Amazing, most pictures, specially the most recent ones, are of very high quality: have a 360 view of NYC from Top of the Rock, or staring at Paris from the top of the Eiffel tower, it's all as if you were there, really! The only thing that's missing though, is a "my favorites" section and the possibility to add it my favorite pictures.

I have download the app but still no connecting to my phone Galaxy s7 this VR gear  Samsung its horrible .my phone was getting a black screen everytime when     put my phone in this stupid VR.i really regret  to buy this .its so stupid .
Great App

I use this for business.it worked fine before recent update.  Now image appears "wobbly" as if it were not meshing the two images properly. More importantly the image now appears reversed horizontally.
Where are the stereoscopic images? All the links go to flat 360 images I can view without a headset on my PC. No point in making VR without the 3D element.
awesome
It's not starting since update...
